actions.name: add_video_to_playlist
actions.description: Add a YouTube video to a playlist.

playlistId.description: The YouTube playlist ID to add the video to.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to add to the playlist.

position.description: The zero-based position for the new playlist item.

note.description: A user note associated with the playlist item when supported by YouTube.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for adding a YouTube video to a playlist.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after adding a video to a YouTube playlist.

actions.name: create_comment_reply
actions.description: Reply to an existing YouTube comment thread.

parentId.description: The parent YouTube comment ID to reply to.

textOriginal.description: The plain-text reply content to post.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for replying to a YouTube comment.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after replying to a YouTube comment.

actions.name: create_playlist
actions.description: Create a YouTube playlist owned by the authenticated user.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a YouTube playlist.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after creating a YouTube playlist.

actions.name: delete_caption
actions.description: Delete a YouTube caption track.

captionId.description: The YouTube caption track ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a YouTube caption track.

id.description: The YouTube resource ID that was deleted.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: A YouTube deletion acknowledgement wrapper.

actions.name: delete_playlist
actions.description: Delete a YouTube playlist owned by the authenticated user.

playlistId.description: The YouTube playlist ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a YouTube playlist.

id.description: The YouTube resource ID that was deleted.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: A YouTube deletion acknowledgement wrapper.

actions.name: delete_playlist_item
actions.description: Delete an item from a YouTube playlist.

playlistItemId.description: The YouTube playlist item ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a YouTube playlist item.

id.description: The YouTube resource ID that was deleted.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: A YouTube deletion acknowledgement wrapper.

actions.name: delete_video
actions.description: Delete a YouTube video owned by the authenticated user.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to delete.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a YouTube video.

id.description: The YouTube resource ID that was deleted.

deleted.description: Whether the delete request completed successfully.

outputSchema.description: A YouTube deletion acknowledgement wrapper.

actions.name: download_caption
actions.description: Download a YouTube caption track and return a temporary transit URL.

captionId.description: The YouTube caption track ID to download.

tfmt.description: The caption output format requested from YouTube, such as srt or vtt.

tlang.description: The caption language to translate into when supported by YouTube.

fileName.description: The output filename used for the transit file.

mimeType.description: The MIME type to report for the downloaded caption file.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for downloading a YouTube caption track.

file.description: A file downloaded through the connector transit file service.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after downloading a YouTube caption track.

actions.name: get_video_rating
actions.description: Get the authenticated user's rating for one or more YouTube videos.

ids.description: The YouTube video IDs whose ratings should be retrieved.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving YouTube video ratings.

ratings.description: The video ratings returned by YouTube.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving YouTube video ratings.

actions.name: list_caption_tracks
actions.description: List YouTube caption tracks for a video or caption track IDs.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID whose caption tracks should be listed.

ids.description: The YouTube caption track IDs to retrieve.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube caption tracks.

captions.description: The caption tracks returned by YouTube.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube caption tracks.

actions.name: list_channels
actions.description: List YouTube channel resources by ID, username, handle, or authenticated owner.

ids.description: The YouTube channel IDs to retrieve.

forHandle.description: A YouTube channel handle such as @GoogleDevelopers.

mine.description: Whether to list channels owned by the authenticated user.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

pageToken.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous YouTube API response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube channels.

anyOf.description: The token for the next result page.
The token for the previous result page.

totalResults.description: The total result count reported by YouTube.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in this page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube channels.

actions.name: list_comment_threads
actions.description: List top-level YouTube comment threads for a video, channel, or thread IDs.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID whose comment threads should be listed.

channelId.description: The YouTube channel ID whose comment threads should be listed.

ids.description: The YouTube comment thread IDs to retrieve.

allThreadsRelatedToChannelId.description: The YouTube channel ID used to retrieve all related comment threads.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

pageToken.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous YouTube API response.

order.description: The order used for comment thread results.

textFormat.description: The comment text format returned by YouTube.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube comment threads.

commentThreads.description: The comment threads returned by YouTube.

anyOf.description: The token for the next result page.
The token for the previous result page.

totalResults.description: The total result count reported by YouTube.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in this page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube comment threads.

actions.name: list_comments
actions.description: List YouTube comments by parent comment ID or comment IDs.

parentId.description: The YouTube parent comment ID whose replies should be listed.

ids.description: The YouTube comment IDs to retrieve.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

pageToken.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous YouTube API response.

textFormat.description: The comment text format returned by YouTube.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube comments.

anyOf.description: The token for the next result page.
The token for the previous result page.

totalResults.description: The total result count reported by YouTube.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in this page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube comments.

actions.name: list_i18n_languages
actions.description: List YouTube interface languages.

hl.description: The language used for localized snippet text.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube interface languages.

languages.description: The i18n languages returned by YouTube.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube interface languages.

actions.name: list_i18n_regions
actions.description: List YouTube content regions.

hl.description: The language used for localized snippet text.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube content regions.

regions.description: The i18n regions returned by YouTube.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube content regions.

actions.name: list_playlist_items
actions.description: List videos and resources contained in a YouTube playlist.

playlistId.description: The YouTube playlist ID to inspect.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

pageToken.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous YouTube API response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube playlist items.

playlistItems.description: The playlist items returned by YouTube.

anyOf.description: The token for the next result page.
The token for the previous result page.

totalResults.description: The total result count reported by YouTube.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in this page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube playlist items.

actions.name: list_playlists
actions.description: List YouTube playlists by ID, channel, or authenticated owner.

ids.description: The YouTube playlist IDs to retrieve.

channelId.description: The YouTube channel ID whose playlists should be listed.

mine.description: Whether to list playlists owned by the authenticated user.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

pageToken.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous YouTube API response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube playlists.

anyOf.description: The token for the next result page.
The token for the previous result page.

totalResults.description: The total result count reported by YouTube.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in this page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube playlists.

actions.name: list_video_categories
actions.description: List YouTube video categories for a region or category IDs.

ids.description: The YouTube video category IDs to retrieve.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube video categories.

categories.description: The video categories returned by YouTube.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube video categories.

actions.name: list_videos
actions.description: List YouTube video resources by ID or chart.

ids.description: The YouTube video IDs to retrieve.

chart.description: The chart used when listing videos without explicit IDs.

mine.description: Whether to list videos owned by the authenticated user.

items.description: One YouTube API part such as snippet or statistics.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

pageToken.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous YouTube API response.

regionCode.description: An ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code used with chart requests.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing YouTube videos.

anyOf.description: The token for the next result page.
The token for the previous result page.

totalResults.description: The total result count reported by YouTube.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in this page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing YouTube videos.

actions.name: post_comment
actions.description: Post a top-level public comment on a YouTube video.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to comment on.

channelId.description: The channel ID for the video being commented on.

textOriginal.description: The plain-text comment content to post.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for posting a YouTube comment.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after posting a YouTube comment.

actions.name: rate_video
actions.description: Set or clear the authenticated user's rating for a YouTube video.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to rate.

rating.description: The rating to apply to the video.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for rating a YouTube video.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID that was rated.

success.description: Whether YouTube accepted the rating request.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after rating a YouTube video.

actions.name: search
actions.description: Search YouTube for videos, channels, or playlists.

type.description: Resource types to include in search results.

order.description: The order used for search results.

channelId.description: Only return resources owned by this YouTube channel.

publishedAfter.description: Only return resources created at or after this timestamp.

publishedBefore.description: Only return resources created at or before this timestamp.

regionCode.description: An ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 region code used to tune search results.

relevanceLanguage.description: An ISO 639-1 language code used to tune search results.

safeSearch.description: The safe search setting for YouTube search.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

pageToken.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous YouTube API response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching YouTube.

results.description: The search results returned by YouTube.

anyOf.description: The token for the next result page.
The token for the previous result page.

totalResults.description: The total result count reported by YouTube.

resultsPerPage.description: The number of results included in this page.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when searching YouTube.

actions.name: set_thumbnail_from_url
actions.description: Upload and set a custom YouTube video thumbnail from an HTTPS image URL.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID whose thumbnail should be replaced.

imageUrl.description: The HTTPS URL of the thumbnail image to upload.

fileName.description: The filename sent to YouTube for the thumbnail media.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the thumbnail image.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for setting a YouTube video thumbnail from a URL.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after setting a YouTube thumbnail.

actions.name: update_caption
actions.description: Update a YouTube caption track's metadata.

captionId.description: The YouTube caption track ID to update.

name.description: The updated caption track display name.

isDraft.description: Whether the caption track should be a draft.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a YouTube caption track.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after updating a YouTube caption track.

actions.name: update_playlist
actions.description: Update a YouTube playlist's snippet and status metadata.

playlistId.description: The YouTube playlist ID to update.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a YouTube playlist.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after updating a YouTube playlist.

actions.name: update_playlist_item
actions.description: Update a YouTube playlist item's position or note.

playlistItemId.description: The YouTube playlist item ID to update.

playlistId.description: The YouTube playlist ID that contains the item.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID referenced by the playlist item.

position.description: The zero-based position for the playlist item.

note.description: A user note associated with the playlist item when supported by YouTube.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a YouTube playlist item.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after updating a YouTube playlist item.

actions.name: update_video
actions.description: Update a YouTube video's snippet and status metadata.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to update.

tags.description: Tags to attach to the video.

categoryId.description: The updated YouTube video category ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a YouTube video.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after updating a YouTube video.

actions.name: upload_caption_from_url
actions.description: Upload a YouTube caption track from an HTTPS caption file URL.

captionUrl.description: The HTTPS URL of the caption file to upload.

videoId.description: The YouTube video ID to attach the caption track to.

language.description: The caption track language, such as en or zh-Hans.

isDraft.description: Whether the uploaded caption track should be a draft.

fileName.description: The filename sent to YouTube for the caption media.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the caption file.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for uploading a YouTube caption track from a URL.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after uploading a YouTube caption track.

actions.name: upload_video_from_url
actions.description: Upload a YouTube video from an HTTPS media URL using the resumable upload API.

mediaUrl.description: The HTTPS URL of the video file to upload.

tags.description: Tags to attach to the video.

fileName.description: The filename sent to YouTube for the uploaded media.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the video media.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for uploading a YouTube video from a URL.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after uploading a YouTube video.
